description: Per-day driving segments for the trip. Each segment is the drive on a given date, routed through its waypoints. play:true waypoints are courses (basket markers); camp:true are booked campgrounds (tent markers); others are cities/overnights. Run build_segments.py to produce route_segments.geojson.
